title: Dungeon RPG: Desert Frontier
description: This mod adds dungeons and dangerous structures to the badlands biome.
body:
Dungeon RPG: Desert Frontier expands the Badlands biome with desert structures crafted by the Everyday Experience team. Exploring these dungeons is no easy task: each one features an event that players can trigger, and upon completion, they can earn loot as a reward. The design aims to bring more depth to biome exploration, adding an extra layer of challenge and making it perfect for modpacks and RPG-style worlds, where desert dungeons become more engaging and exciting.
